case_title: FRED NELSON MANLEY VS. AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.50 FILED BY MANLEY, FRED NELSON AS TO DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANLEY, FRED NELSON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-14-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANLEY, FRED NELSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS $525.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
